{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Hand Drill|2}}{{R|Hand Drill||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Trash Heap|2}}. It applies 2 Vulnerable when an enemy's block is broken.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained randomly from {{E|Trash Heap|2}} by selecting the {{Frame|Dive In}} option.
